title: Draconic Mekanism
description: A modpack with mekanism and ice and fire. Also with essential to allow play with friends
body:
This is a very basic modpack that lets you play ice and fire with mekansim for some tech and resource gathering boosts to help you along. Intended to be played with freinds via essential mod, but perfectly playable in survival singleplayer. 

**I own nothing in this modpack. All mods belong to their respective owners**
